name: Quaint Seas Dinner Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the warm water (1/3 cup), yeast, and 1 tablespoon sugar in a bowl until bubbly.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the remaining 1 tablespoon sugar, warm water (2/3 cup), mayonnaise, salt, and 2 cups of flour. Beat until smooth.
3. Add the yeast mixture to the batter and mix well.
4. Add an additional 2 cups of flour and stir until the batter is smooth.
5. Grease a bowl with Pam and pour in the batter. Cover and let rise until doubled in size.
6. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Pour the batter into 12 greased muffin wells, filling each about 2/3 full.
8. Let the rolls rise for 45 minutes.
9. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 18-20 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Makes 12 rolls.
